sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36323" key="e)ntropalismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐντροπᾰλ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n36323.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">turning round,</tr_> Sch.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3p.213D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
